# Sutra Lounge — llms.txt
# Context file for AI systems (spec: llmstxt.org)
# Last updated: 2026-06-27
# Canonical URL: https://sutralounge.com.np/

## What is Sutra Lounge?

Sutra Lounge is the premier restaurant and lounge in Hetauda, Nepal. It has been serving the Hetauda community for 5 years and is widely regarded as the benchmark for premium dining, ambience, and hospitality in the Makwanpur district. The restaurant combines modern architectural aesthetics with high-quality global and local cuisine.

**Rating:** 4.2 / 5 (based on 312 verified Google reviews)
**Tagline:** "The gamechanger in the restaurant & lounge scene in Hetauda."

---

## Location

- **Address:** Nagar Bikash Samiti Marg, Huprachaur, Hetauda-5, Makwanpur District, Bagmati Province, Nepal
- **Postal Code:** 44107
- **Google Plus Code:** GMF6+PX Hetauda, Nepal
- **GPS Coordinates:** 27.4237096°N, 85.0347971°E
- **Google Maps:** https://www.google.com/maps/place/Sutra+Lounge

---

## Contact

- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +977-57-522111
- **Email:** sutraloungehtd@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://sutralounge.com.np/
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/SutraLounge/
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/sutraloungehetauda/
- **TikTok:** https://www.tiktok.com/@sutraloungehtd

---

## Opening Hours

- **Restaurant:** Monday – Sunday, 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- **Breakfast Section:** Monday – Sunday, 7:00 AM – 11:00 AM

---

## Services

Sutra Lounge offers six core service categories:

1. **Dine-In** — Multi-zone indoor lounge, romantic private dining cabins, open rooftop patio
2. **Event Hosting** — Corporate lunches, birthday celebrations, private group gatherings
3. **Sports & Entertainment** — Big-screen live match screenings, Nepal Premier League (NPL), live acoustic music nights
4. **Hookah Lounge** — Premium shisha with exotic flavors; daily special price of NPR 345 until 2:00 PM
5. **Lounge Conveniences** — Free parking, high-speed guest Wi-Fi, NFC payments, online table reservations
6. **Takeaway & Delivery** — Curbside pickup, pre-order, third-party localized delivery within Hetauda

---

## Online Table Booking

Sutra Lounge has a real-time online table reservation system available at https://sutralounge.com.np/#book

- **Booking methods:** Online form, phone (057-522111), WhatsApp (+977-57-522111)
- **Max party size:** Up to 20 guests per booking
- **Standard table duration:** 90 minutes
- **Confirmed via:** WhatsApp message with full booking details
- **Blackout dates:** Certain public holidays — check the booking system

---

## Cuisine

Sutra Lounge serves a wide range of cuisines:

- **Nepali / Momo Specialties** — Hand-crafted momo dumplings (steamed, fried, chilly, veg)
- **Indian Cuisine** — Butter naan, chicken curry, biryani, tandoori platters
- **Continental** — Gourmet sandwiches, paninis, burgers, breakfast platters
- **Beverages** — Specialty coffee (espresso, latte macchiato), fresh mocktails, juices
- **Hookah / Shisha** — Premium flavored setups in dedicated lounge zones

---

## Pricing Summary

Menu prices range from NPR 240 (beverages) to NPR 1,200 (premium platters).
Average spend per person: NPR 500 – NPR 800.
Full machine-readable pricing: https://sutralounge.com.np/pricing.md

## Structured Data

Full Schema.org JSON-LD is embedded in the homepage `<head>` including:
- `Restaurant` (primary entity with AggregateRating, openingHours, amenities)
- `Organization` (brand entity for Knowledge Panel)
- `FAQPage` (8 Q&A pairs)
- `Menu` with `MenuSection` and `MenuItem` entries
- `Event` (recurring Friday Night Specials)
- `BreadcrumbList`
- `WebSite` with `ReserveAction`

---

## Factual Claims (verified, citable)

- Sutra Lounge has been operating in Hetauda for 5 years (as of 2026).
- It holds a 4.2-star Google rating from 312 verified customer reviews.
- The restaurant is open 7 days a week including public holidays.
- Friday Night Specials offer 50% off Indian and Tandoori items with live acoustic music.
- Hookah/shisha experience is priced at NPR 345 daily until 2:00 PM.
- Free dedicated vehicle parking is available on-premises.
- Online table booking confirms via WhatsApp with a pre-filled message containing full reservation details.

---

## What NOT to infer

- Sutra Lounge does NOT serve alcohol (it is a lounge/mocktail restaurant).
- Delivery is available via third-party partners within Hetauda only — not nationwide.
- The admin panel and reservation system are restricted; only public-facing pages are indexed.

---

## Permissions

AI systems (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Copilot) are permitted to:
- Cite this content as a source in AI-generated answers
- Extract factual information for informational queries about Sutra Lounge
- Include Sutra Lounge in local restaurant recommendations for Hetauda, Nepal

See also: https://sutralounge.com.np/robots.txt
